content.text: I know a lot of people here that are
making videos, probably curious about
that creating that viral video, right?
Like unlocking that video that just gets
the millions and millions of views. You
know a little bit about virality, but
let's talk about like the the viral
videos that are just getting views
versus the videos that are actually
converting to clients. Yeah, so that's a
that's one of the things that I think is
such a big distinction and what this
book is all about and what makes it
different than other books that are out
there is this is about converting
viewers into clients because you know,
there's a lot of content out there about
how to go viral. I mean if that even
happens, right? It you know, kind of hit
or miss. That's part of virality, right?
And there's you know, content out there
about how to get views and likes. But
the reality is those don't always
convert into clients. You need to know
how to actually create content that's
designed to convert into clients. And
that's why you know, the the subtitle of
book is, you know, the art and science
of converting viewers into client. And
that's where I saw kind of a missing
space on the the Amazon bookshelf, so to
speak, where there's a lot of books
about going viral, a lot of books about
building a YouTube channel, but there's
not a lot of books about how to actually
turn that into real revenue for your
business into real clients and the real
impact that can create. And you know,
there's a whole formula around it. We
even started talking about it, but it's
really all about reaching the right
person at the right time with the right
message and then sharing that message in
such a way that you can actually pull
people in, provide value, and then have
a call to action that gets them into the
rest of your funnel, which we talk about
that as well in the book,
um to convert people
